item.title: Real Fighter Jet for $60K
item.description: A look at a real fighter jet reportedly listed for $60K, with commentary on the aircraft and what makes the deal stand out. What would you want to know about it?

media:content.media:title: Real Fighter Jet for $60K
media:content.media:description: A look at a real fighter jet reportedly listed for $60K, with commentary on the aircraft and what makes the deal stand out. What would you want to know about it?

item.title: Buying a Backyard Aircraft Collection
item.description: A look at the purchase of a backyard collection featuring aircraft and aviation-related finds. The video explores the condition, history, and potential of the collection. What would you be most excited to discover in a collection like this?

media:content.media:title: Buying a Backyard Aircraft Collection
media:content.media:description: A look at the purchase of a backyard collection featuring aircraft and aviation-related finds. The video explores the condition, history, and potential of the collection. What would you be most excited to discover in a collection like this?

item.title: Emergency Landing Story from the Cockpit
item.description: A firsthand story about an emergency aircraft landing and the events leading up to it. The video discusses the situation, decision-making process, and overall experience during the flight. What do you think is the most important skill during an in-flight emergency?

media:content.media:title: Emergency Landing Story from the Cockpit
media:content.media:description: A firsthand story about an emergency aircraft landing and the events leading up to it. The video discusses the situation, decision-making process, and overall experience during the flight. What do you think is the most important skill during an in-flight emergency?
